name: 2441ef86-d291-4bb4-8e2d-24817aefcabe
description: Simulated user goes off-topic for several turns (asks about parking, dress code) before resuming the reservation. Tests that the steer-back mechanism recovers the conversation and completes the booking.
evaluationDatasets: Bella Notte Slot Machine - Full Suite

scenario.task: Make a dinner reservation at Bella Notte for 2 people on June 20th, 2026. When asked for a time, choose 7:30 PM. The reservation name is Kim. No special requests. IMPORTANT: After giving your party size and confirming it, go off-topic for 2 turns: first ask about parking near the restaurant, then ask about the dress code. After those 2 off-topic turns, cooperate normally with the agent for the rest of the reservation.
rubrics: The agent must successfully complete the reservation despite the off-topic detours.
The agent must steer the conversation back to the reservation flow after the off-topic turns.
The agent must collect all required information: party size, date, time, name, and special requests.
